mapper.select: SELECT * FROM biz_show WHERE category = #{category} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM biz_show WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT * FROM biz_show WHERE status = 1 AND ( name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR venue LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY create_time DESC
